# Open Sales Stack

> Open source MCP servers and Claude Skills for B2B sales research.
> Built by Ekas (https://ekas.io). No paid API keys required for most tools.

## About

Open Sales Stack is a collection of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers designed for B2B sales professionals who use Claude. Each MCP gives Claude the ability to research companies and prospects using public web data.

Install with: git clone, run setup.sh, run add-to-claude.sh.

## MCP Servers

- [Website Intel](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/website-intel): Scrape any website and extract structured data as JSON using a custom schema. Supports JS-heavy SPAs.
- [Techstack Intel](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/techstack-intel): Detect what tools and technologies a company uses by analyzing their website source code.
- [Social Intel](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/social-intel): Scrape LinkedIn profiles, companies, and company posts for structured sales intelligence.
- [Hiring Intel](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/hiring-intel): Find open roles at a company from their careers page and ATS platforms like Greenhouse and Lever.
- [Review Intel](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/review-intel): Extract ratings, reviews, and sentiment from G2, Capterra, and Glassdoor.
- [Ad Intel](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/ad-intel): Check LinkedIn Ad Library and Meta Ad Library for a company's active ad campaigns.

## Skills

- [Lead Qualification](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/skills/lead-qualification): Methodology for evaluating if a company is ICP fit based on research data.
- [Prospect Research](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/skills/prospect-research): Complete account-level and contact-level research methodology.
- [LinkedIn Recon](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/skills/linkedin-recon): How to evaluate a prospect's LinkedIn profile and posts for outreach signals.
- [Cold Email Personalization](https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack/skills/cold-email-personalization): Turn research data into personalized outreach.

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/ekas-io/open-sales-stack
- Website: https://ekas.io/open-sales-stack
